title: bauhinia pervilleana
intro: Bauhinia pervilleana, also known as the yellow orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Bauhinia. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bauhinia pervilleana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
